title: Tum Milo Toh Sahi
cast: Nana Patekar, Dimple Kapadia, Sunil Shetty, Vidya Malvade, Rehan Khan, Anjana Sukhani, Mohnish Bahl, Vrajesh Hirjee
description: An astute but old-fashioned law clerk steps up to help the owner of a cafe in a legal battle that has both business and personal ramifications.

title: Lucky: No Time for Love
cast: Salman Khan, Sneha Ullal, Mithun Chakraborty, Kader Khan, Navni Parihar, Ravi Baswani, Vikram Gokhale, Mumait Khan
description: During an uprising in Russia's St. Petersburg, teen girl Lucky meets handsome Aditya, the Indian ambassador's son, and together they flee the chaos.

title: Soni
cast: Geetika Vidya Ohlyan, Saloni Batra, Mohinder Gujral, Mohit Chauhan, Vikas Shukla, Gauri Chakraborty, Simrat Kaur, Dimple Kaur
description: While fighting crimes against women in Delhi, a short-fused policewoman and her level-headed female boss grapple with gender issues in their own lives.

title: Yeh Hai Bakrapur
cast: Amit Sial, Yoshika Verma, Anshuman Jha, Asif Basra, Suruchi Aulakh
description: A poor family’s goat suddenly acquires divine status, sparking a widespread frenzy as everyone clamors to benefit from its unexpected celebrity.

title: Umrika
cast: Suraj Sharma, Tony Revolori, Smita Tambe, Adil Hussain, Rajesh Tailang, Prateik Babbar, Pramod Pathak, Amit Sial, Sauraseni Maitra
description: An ambitious man leaves his small Indian village for America. But when his letters to home stop coming, his brother sets out on his own adventure.

title: Nasha
cast: Shivam Patil, Poonam Pandey, Sheetal Singh, Vishal Bhosle, Rohan Khurana, Ranbir Chakma, Raj Kesaria, Chirag Lobo
description: A teenage boy becomes smitten with his new drama teacher and pursues her, despite the perilous risks of being found out.

title: Chaman Bahaar
cast: Jitendra Kumar, Ritika Badiani, Yogendra Tikku, Bhuvan Arora, Alam Khan, Dhirendra Tiwari, Ashwani Kumar, Bhagwan Tiwari
description: A local shop becomes a hub for young men taken with the new neighbor. But as business booms, it may leave the equally smitten storeowner heartbroken.

title: Ek Hasina Thi
cast: Saif Ali Khan, Urmila Matondkar, Seema Biswas, Pratima Kazmi, Aditya Srivastava, Rasika Joshi, Madan Joshi, Seema Adhikari
description: Imprisoned for underworld crimes she didn’t commit, a vengeful woman breaks free and goes scorched earth on the smooth-talking suitor who framed her.

title: Aapla Manus
cast: Nana Patekar, Sumeet Raghvan, Iravati Harshe, Aashish Kulkarni, Savita Malpekar
description: When a man falls from his balcony, an investigator questions the victim’s family, determined to uncover a darker truth behind the alleged accident.

title: What Are the Odds?
cast: Yashaswini Dayama, Karanvir Malhotra, Abhay Deol, Priyanka Bose, Monica Dogra, Sulabha Arya, Manu Rishi Chadha, Ananya Melkote
description: When two unlikely friends play hooky from school, accidental encounters and otherworldly events turn their day into a whimsical coming-of-age journey.
